survivor_data: A study of 200 successful startups found that 90% of founders dropped out of college, worked 80+ hour weeks, and pivoted their product at least once.
conclusion_question: Should an aspiring entrepreneur drop out of college and work 80+ hour weeks to maximize their chance of success?

survivor_data: An analysis of 500 profitable hedge funds shows they all employed contrarian investment strategies and concentrated their portfolios in fewer than 20 stocks.
conclusion_question: Does adopting a contrarian, concentrated strategy reliably lead to hedge fund profitability?

survivor_data: Every military aircraft that returned from WWII combat missions had bullet holes concentrated on the wings and fuselage but almost none on the engine.
conclusion_question: Should engineers add armor to the wings and fuselage where the bullet holes were found?

survivor_data: A survey of people who have lived past 100 years old found that 70% smoked at some point in their lives and regularly ate red meat.
conclusion_question: Does smoking and eating red meat not significantly reduce lifespan?

survivor_data: Interviews with 300 bestselling authors reveal they all wrote every day, received dozens of rejections before publishing, and had a strict morning writing routine.
conclusion_question: Will following a daily morning writing routine and persisting through rejections lead to becoming a bestselling author?
